data_quality_notes: World Bank indicator SH.DYN.MORT (Under-5 mortality rate (related WASH proxy)) used as proxy. WHO GHO diarrheal incidence data unavailable via API. This is a related WASH/water-disease metric.Proxy label: World Bank SH.DYN.MORT. Note: reporting bias expected (low-income countries underreport diarrhea). Literature (Troeger 2018, Vos 2020) reports r≈0.60–0.75 and ≥0.80 respectively.
summary: Bivariate Pearson r=0.911 (p=0.0000), Spearman rho=0.947. Partial correlation could not be computed. Best functional form: quadratic. Literature (Troeger 2018, Vos 2020) reports r≈0.60–0.75 and ≥0.80 respectively.
